reviews.review_description:
I highly recommend this one It's a great survivor style game  the graphics look very solid and the 3d effect is great if you like vampire survivors or anything like that then you will definitely enjoy this it feels similar to that but with a little bit more depth because of the 3d space 
Would love to see more enemy types and a few different locations maybe a few skins for your mech of different characters keep up the fantastic work

reviews.review_title: Survivor like but in all 3 dimensions!
reviews.review_description: Picked this up at £1 what a bargain! Didn't realise it was by the creators of Harpagun and Toy Trains, both amazing games! You ever held an action figure in your hand and pretended they had a jetpack? It controls like that, but better. So far I have 4 weapon slots and 2 perk slots but I feel maybe the lighting is OP but it's very fun and polished! If you've played vampire survivors, or magic survival it's a bit like that except you equip the weapons you want before you start, and all the enemies either move towards you (but in 3d instead of 2d) or they go after a pillar thing on the ground you have to defend. Everything is miniturised so you don't have to have a lot of room to play, I played it sitting down. Pressing grip on the opposite controller makes the character face the other way which is really clever because it can be awkward rotating the controller! Or you can hold the controller in a funny way so you spin it around in your hand. Clever concept well executed and fun /addictive
Simple and fun. Amazing playing a survivor game in VR. Great progression system keeps you wanting to go one more round. Hope is keeps developing but still worth it already.

This game is awesome!!! Super cool concept the hero is in your hand think yuki space ranger but different.  Upgrade system is very fun and choice of weapon and perk combo to bring into battle is strategic for optimal progression.  Please don’t abandon this game bring it out of early access.  It’s literally the only game of its kind on the quest and has a place in anyone’s library for a change of pace and something unique and different which these days is few and far between.  Bravo development team very cool game.  I hope to see more!!

Thank you

This game is a VR-take on the Vampire Survivors genre. It has it's issues but having anything in this genre on the platform is a good thing and I have put more hours into this than more expensive titles.

reviews.review_title: Old school charm with new mechanics
reviews.review_description:
Love this game it reminds me of old arcade games like the side scrolling shooters. 
The only thing missing is the scrolling lol.

Probably the most addictive VR game I've ever played. All it needs right now is more content! It seems like the devs have put this aside for now, but I really hope they'll continue working on it again soon. This could be huge!

Arcade MASTERPIECE 
Im not a person who’s easily impressed and extremely picky. Im the type who complains why are there so many shooters THIS IS FRESH!!! 

Pros: smooth easy controls
Combat system feels like a modern space shooter like it were galaga with a robot and upgraded weapons. 
Its not a tower defence game thankfully only part that makes it feel that way is the lightning other than that everything is in your control.
Great graphics 
Character models
HUGE REPLAY VALUE

I am just roughly 2hrs in and love the upgrade system, levels are called day 1 day 2. Leveling up unlocks more perks and weapons and permanent upgrades. 

Brilliant game, i would love to see more what this series can do in the future and its developers. 

My wish list; I can imagine different environments, and even levels and parts that youre on the rails shooter type game, like how drop dead and house of the dead is on the rails. But this prospective looks like itll be fun for an open world mmorpg. Instantly i thought why does this look better than ZENITH the last city lol. 

Thanks for making it I can imagine many replay throughs with this. 😏

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for this amazing feedback! It’s incredible to hear how much you’re enjoying the game and how deeply you’ve connected with it. We’re thrilled that you appreciate the smooth controls, combat system, and replay value—it’s exactly what we hoped players would feel. 😊

reviews.review_description: Yeah I'm not gonna lie, I was one of the people who made that game but hey - I still recommend it. It's loads of fun, especially in short bursts when you want to feed your brain with some endorphins.

super fun game that will get you addicted to the game and maybe even the genre, would like to see more content, it is early access so i give them a pass for now, i do have to launch to play a run every time i open my quest now(would like to see a pcvr port as thats my main method of VR gaming)

I'm a fan of the genre and really cool to see this in VR.  Looking forward to seeing what the full release looks like but fun to be had hear and definitely worth the small price!

Alex - CrossButtonVR

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your kind words and support! We really appreciate your feedback! It means a lot to us that you're enjoying the game. Stay with us for more surprises—we’re just getting started!  🚀🎮
